expectations.text: Identifies at least 2 distinct error patterns
expectations.evidence: 7 patterns identified: pre-commit hook failures, write-before-read, file does not exist, + more.

expectations.text: Shows frequency (how many sessions each pattern appeared in)
expectations.evidence: '7x across 5 sessions', '4x across 4 sessions', '4x across 3 sessions'.

expectations.text: Cites specific sessions for each pattern
expectations.evidence: Session numbers listed (S2, S5, S6, S7, S8, S10). Note: uses relative numbering, not actual session IDs.
Each pattern has a 'Proposed fix' section with actionable suggestion.

expectations.text: Shorter output than full retrospective (focused mode)
Scans JSONL transcripts, not just CHANGELOG
expectations.evidence: Header: 'parse JSONL, extracao de tool errors (is_error=true)'. Raw extraction file is 5429 lines.
All proposals in text only. No Edit/Write calls to rules/skills.
